title.en: HR-WPAN Foundations: Scope, Vocabulary, and the Piconet at a Glance
title.zh: HR-WPAN 基础：标准范围、术语词典与微微网全景

blocks.en: IEEE Std 802.15.3-2016 is the High-Rate Wireless Personal Area Network (HR-WPAN) standard. Its opening clauses set the stage: Clause 1 says what the standard is for, Clause 3 hands you the vocabulary, and Clause 4 gives a plain-language tour of how the whole system works before any bit-level detail arrives. This lesson walks through all three so you can read the rest of the document fluently. The Scope (1.1) is deliberately narrow and ambitious: define PHY (physical layer) and MAC (medium access control) specifications for high data rate wireless connectivity, typically over 200 Mb/s, among fixed, portable, and moving devices. The Purpose (1.2) explains the why: low complexity, low cost, low power, and high throughput for consumer multimedia, data-center point-to-point links, intra-device backhaul/fronthaul, and quick close-proximity file exchange (think a phone tapping a kiosk or ticket gate).
blocks.zh: IEEE Std 802.15.3-2016 是高速率无线个域网（HR-WPAN）标准。它的开篇几章先搭好舞台：第 1 章说明标准用来做什么，第 3 章交给你术语词典，第 4 章则在进入比特级细节之前，用通俗语言概览整个系统如何运作。本课依次讲透这三章，让你能流畅阅读后续文档。范围（1.1）既克制又有野心：为固定、便携和移动设备之间的高速率无线连接定义 PHY（物理层）和 MAC（介质访问控制）规范，速率通常超过 200 Mb/s。目的（1.2）解释了为什么要这样做：以低复杂度、低成本、低功耗实现高吞吐，服务于消费多媒体、数据中心点对点链路、设备内回传/前传，以及近距离快速文件交换（想象手机轻触自助终端或检票闸机）。

blocks.en: A WPAN (wireless personal area network) is the 'P' part of the picture: it covers the small space around a person or object — roughly 10 m in all directions — versus a LAN (a building), a MAN (a campus or city), or a WAN (a country or the world). HR-WPAN just means a WPAN running at high data rates.
blocks.zh: WPAN（无线个域网）对应图景里的“P”（个人）部分：它覆盖人或物体周围的小空间——大致各方向约 10 米——相比之下 LAN 覆盖一栋楼，MAN 覆盖园区或城市，WAN 覆盖一个国家乃至全球。HR-WPAN 不过就是高速率运行的 WPAN。

blocks.en: Clause 3 is the standard's dictionary, split into Definitions (3.1) and Acronyms and abbreviations (3.2). The definitions pin down terms you will see on every page. A device (DEV) is any entity implementing a conformant 802.15.3 MAC and PHY interface to the wireless medium. A piconet is a collection of logically associated devices sharing one identifier under a common coordinator. The piconet coordinator (PNC) is the DEV that provides coordination services — QoS (quality of service), synchronization, and association. A superframe is the basic time division of a piconet, containing a beacon, the channel time allocation period, and optionally a contention access period. A channel time allocation (CTA) is a contiguous slice of superframe time the PNC grants for a specific source-to-destination conversation, and a stream is a unidirectional logical data connection between two DEVs. Security terms (data authentication, data integrity, integrity code, symmetric key, secure frame, secure piconet, payload protection) round out the list.
blocks.zh: 第 3 章是标准的词典，分为定义（3.1）与首字母缩写及缩略语（3.2）。定义钉死了你在每一页都会见到的术语。设备（DEV）是任何实现了符合 802.15.3 规范的 MAC 与 PHY、并接入无线介质的实体。微微网（piconet）是一组在逻辑上相互关联、共享同一标识符、由共同协调者管理的设备集合。微微网协调者（PNC）是提供协调服务的那个 DEV——包括 QoS（服务质量）、同步与关联。超帧（superframe）是微微网的基本时间划分，包含一个信标、信道时间分配期，以及可选的竞争访问期。信道时间分配（CTA）是 PNC 为某一对特定源到目的的通信所授予的一段连续超帧时间，而流（stream）是两个 DEV 之间的单向逻辑数据连接。安全相关术语（数据认证、数据完整性、完整性码、对称密钥、安全帧、安全微微网、载荷保护）补全了这份清单。

blocks.en: Clause 3.2 lists 100+ acronyms. You do not memorize them — you keep them handy. The high-traffic ones for this standard: DEV (device), PNC (piconet coordinator), DEVID (device identifier), CTA (channel time allocation), CAP (contention access period), CTAP (channel time allocation period), MCTA (management CTA), MAC (medium access control), PHY (physical layer), QoS (quality of service), MCS (modulation and coding scheme), IE (information element), and mmWave (millimeter wave). Define each on first use and the document reads itself.
blocks.zh: 第 3.2 节列出了 100 多个缩写。你不必死记——只需随手备查。本标准里出现最频繁的有：DEV（设备）、PNC（微微网协调者）、DEVID（设备标识符）、CTA（信道时间分配）、CAP（竞争访问期）、CTAP（信道时间分配期）、MCTA（管理 CTA）、MAC（介质访问控制）、PHY（物理层）、QoS（服务质量）、MCS（调制与编码方案）、IE（信息单元）、以及 mmWave（毫米波）。每个术语首次出现时给出定义，文档自然就读得通了。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 460 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="230" cy="110" r="34"/><text x="230" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">PNC</text><text x="230" y="122" text-anchor="middle" font-size="9" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">(/DEV)</text><circle cx="90" cy="45" r="24"/><text x="90" y="49" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">DEV</text><circle cx="90" cy="180" r="24"/><text x="90" y="184" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">DEV</text><circle cx="380" cy="45" r="24"/><text x="380" y="49" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">DEV</text><circle cx="380" cy="180" r="24"/><text x="380" y="184" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">DEV</text><line x1="112" y1="58" x2="200" y2="96" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><line x1="112" y1="167" x2="200" y2="124" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><line x1="358" y1="58" x2="260" y2="96" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><line x1="358" y1="167" x2="260" y2="124" stroke-dasharray="4 3"/><line x1="112" y1="50" x2="356" y2="50"/><text x="234" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">data (peer-to-peer)</text><text x="150" y="86" text-anchor="middle" font-size="8" stroke="none" fill="currentColor">beacon</text></svg>

caption.en: Figure 4-1 style: a piconet is one PNC (which is also a DEV) broadcasting beacons to several DEVs. Data flows peer-to-peer between DEVs (solid top line); the PNC only coordinates timing and access (dashed beacon links).
caption.zh: 图 4-1 风格：一个微微网由一个 PNC（它同时也是 DEV）向若干 DEV 广播信标构成。数据在 DEV 之间点对点流动（顶部实线）；PNC 只负责协调时序与访问（虚线信标链路）。

blocks.en: Clause 4.1 answers 'What is a piconet?' — an ad hoc data system that forms spontaneously, with no pre-planning, and lasts only as long as it is needed. Clause 4.2 names the components: the basic building block is the DEV; exactly one DEV takes the PNC role and provides the beacon (the piconet's heartbeat and timing reference), plus QoS, power-save, and access control. A DEV can ask to form a subordinate piconet under a parent piconet; the subordinate is a child or a neighbor piconet depending on how it associated. Both are dependent piconets (they rely on the parent PNC for channel time); a piconet with no dependents is independent. Clause 4.3 then lists the MAC's design goals — fast connection time, ad hoc networks, QoS data transport, security, dynamic membership, and efficient data transfer — and its sub-clauses (4.3.1 through 4.3.17) tour the mechanisms that deliver them.
blocks.zh: 第 4.1 节回答“什么是微微网？”——它是一个自组织数据系统，无需预先规划即可自发形成，且只在需要期间存在。第 4.2 节列举组成部分：基本构件是 DEV；恰好有一个 DEV 担任 PNC 角色并发送信标（微微网的心跳与时序基准），同时负责 QoS、省电与访问控制。一个 DEV 可以请求在母微微网（parent piconet）之下组建从属微微网；根据其关联方式，从属微微网分为子微微网（child）或邻居微微网（neighbor）。两者都是从属微微网（依赖母 PNC 分配信道时间）；没有任何从属微微网的就是独立微微网。第 4.3 节随后列出 MAC 的设计目标——快速连接、自组织网络、带 QoS 的数据传输、安全、动态成员管理、高效数据传输——其子条款（4.3.1 到 4.3.17）则逐一巡览实现这些目标的机制。

blocks.en: Two MAC mechanisms anchor everything else. First, coordination (4.3.1): a piconet exists the moment a PNC-capable DEV starts sending beacons. Starting (4.3.1.1) means scanning for a clear channel; if none is free, the DEV may instead start a child piconet (4.3.1.3, for coverage extension or offloading) or a neighbor piconet (4.3.1.4, purely a way to share spectrum when no PHY channel is vacant). Control can move via handover (4.3.1.2) so the most-capable DEV becomes PNC without interrupting service. Ending a piconet (4.3.2) uses a PNC Shutdown IE in the beacon; if a dependent piconet is involved (4.3.3), the parent names one dependent that may keep operating. Second, the superframe (4.3.6) and channel time management (4.3.7): every superframe is beacon + optional CAP (contention access period, using CSMA/CA — carrier sense multiple access with collision avoidance) + CTAP (channel time allocation period, using TDMA — time division multiple access — slots called CTAs and MCTAs). Data moves three ways: asynchronously in the CAP, as isochronous (regularly recurring) streams in CTAs, or as asynchronous bulk transfers in CTAs.
blocks.zh: 有两个 MAC 机制支撑起其余一切。第一是协调（4.3.1）：只要一个具备 PNC 能力的 DEV 开始发送信标，微微网就存在了。启动（4.3.1.1）意味着扫描空闲信道；若没有空闲信道，该 DEV 可以转而启动子微微网（4.3.1.3，用于扩展覆盖或卸载负载）或邻居微微网（4.3.1.4，纯粹是在没有空闲 PHY 信道时共享频谱的方式）。控制权可经移交（4.3.1.2）转移，让最有能力的 DEV 成为 PNC 而不中断服务。结束微微网（4.3.2）通过在信标中放入 PNC Shutdown IE 完成；若涉及从属微微网（4.3.3），母网会指定一个可继续运行的从属微微网。第二是超帧（4.3.6）与信道时间管理（4.3.7）：每个超帧 = 信标 + 可选 CAP（竞争访问期，采用 CSMA/CA——带冲突避免的载波侦听多路访问）+ CTAP（信道时间分配期，采用 TDMA——时分多址——其时隙称为 CTA 与 MCTA）。数据有三种传输方式：在 CAP 中异步发送、在 CTA 中作为等时（周期性重复）流发送、或在 CTA 中作为异步批量传输发送。

blocks.en: The remaining 4.3 mechanisms each solve one practical problem: association/disassociation (4.3.4) hands out a short DEVID instead of a full address to save overhead; the security overview (4.3.5) defines Mode 0 (open) and Mode 1 (secure membership + AES-128 CCM payload protection); data communications (4.3.8) cover fragmentation and the no-ACK / Imm-ACK / Dly-ACK delivery policies; information discovery (4.3.9) lets DEVs query each other's services; dynamic channel selection (4.3.10) lets the PNC hop the whole piconet to a cleaner channel without dropping CTAs; power management (4.3.11) gives DSPS, PSPS, and APS sleep modes; transmit power control (4.3.12) trims interference and battery drain; and the mmWave-specific items — quasi-omni superframe (4.3.13), frame aggregation (4.3.14), beam forming (4.3.15), channel probing (4.3.16), and unequal error protection / UEP (4.3.17) — make high-frequency, directional links practical.
blocks.zh: 4.3 中其余各机制各自解决一个实际问题：关联/解关联（4.3.4）发放短小的 DEVID 而非完整地址以节省开销；安全概览（4.3.5）定义了模式 0（开放）与模式 1（安全成员资格 + AES-128 CCM 载荷保护）；数据通信（4.3.8）涵盖分片以及 no-ACK / Imm-ACK / Dly-ACK 三种交付策略；信息发现（4.3.9）让 DEV 之间互相查询服务；动态信道选择（4.3.10）让 PNC 把整个微微网跳转到更干净的信道而不丢失 CTA；功率管理（4.3.11）提供 DSPS、PSPS、APS 三种睡眠模式；发射功率控制（4.3.12）削减干扰与耗电；而那些毫米波专属项——准全向超帧（4.3.13）、帧聚合（4.3.14）、波束成形（4.3.15）、信道探测（4.3.16）、以及非等差错保护 / UEP（4.3.17）——则让高频定向链路变得可行。

blocks.en: Clauses 4.4 and 4.5 introduce the two PHY families. The 2.4 GHz PHY (4.4.1) uses the 2.4–2.4835 GHz unlicensed band, defines 4-channel (high-density) and 3-channel (better 802.11b coexistence) plans, and offers five data rates from 11 to 55 Mb/s using QPSK/DQPSK/16-QAM/32-QAM/64-QAM with trellis coding; its 15 MHz on-air bandwidth and CAZAC preamble are tuned for many clean channels. Its coexistence and interoperability story (4.4.2) leans on passive scanning, dynamic channel selection, link-quality and RSSI (received signal strength indication) reporting, transmit power control, and the neighbor-piconet trick. The mmWave PHY (4.5.1) lives in 57–66 GHz and ships three sub-PHYs — SC (single carrier, up to 5 Gb/s), HSI (high speed interface, OFDM for NLOS), and AV (audio/visual, OFDM for uncompressed video) — with a common mode signaling (CMS) baseline so they coexist. Clause 4.5.2 explains that the PHY modes a PNC supports determine the kind of piconet it starts (an AV piconet, HSI piconet, SC piconet, or a multi-mode arrangement).
blocks.zh: 第 4.4 和 4.5 节介绍两大 PHY 家族。2.4 GHz PHY（4.4.1）使用 2.4–2.4835 GHz 免许可频段，定义了 4 信道（高密度）与 3 信道（更好地与 802.11b 共存）两套信道规划，并通过 QPSK/DQPSK/16-QAM/32-QAM/64-QAM 加网格编码提供 11 到 55 Mb/s 共五档速率；其 15 MHz 空口带宽与 CAZAC 前导码专为容纳更多干净信道而调校。它的共存与互操作（4.4.2）依赖被动扫描、动态信道选择、链路质量与 RSSI（接收信号强度指示）上报、发射功率控制以及邻居微微网技巧。mmWave PHY（4.5.1）位于 57–66 GHz，提供三个子 PHY——SC（单载波，最高 5 Gb/s）、HSI（高速接口，用 OFDM 应对非视距）、AV（音视频，用 OFDM 传输未压缩视频）——并以公共模式信令（CMS）作为基线以保证彼此共存。第 4.5.2 节说明：PNC 所支持的 PHY 模式决定它启动何种微微网（AV 微微网、HSI 微微网、SC 微微网，或多模式安排）。

blocks.en: The clause closes with two reading aids. Conventions (4.6) tell you how the text is written so names never confuse you: Frame names are capitalized and carry the word 'frame' (Beacon frame); commands carry 'command' (Association Request command); fields carry 'field'; IE names carry the acronym IE (Capability IE); MAC and PHY PIB (PAN information base) entries use a lowercase 'mac' or 'phy' prefix (macDevServicesBroadcast, phyCurrentChannel); MAC constants begin with italic 'm' and PHY constants with italic 'p'; and service primitives are ALL CAPS while their suffixes (.request, .indication, .response, .confirm) stay lowercase. The concept of primitives (4.7) is the abstraction the whole standard uses for layer-to-layer interaction: a service primitive crosses a SAP (service access point) between a layer and its user, and comes in exactly four generic types — request (start a service), indication (signal an internal event to the user), response (complete a procedure begun by an indication), and confirm (return the result of a prior request).
blocks.zh: 本章以两个阅读辅助收尾。约定（4.6）告诉你文本是如何书写的，让命名不再混淆：帧名首字母大写并带“frame”一词（Beacon frame）；命令带“command”（Association Request command）；字段带“field”；IE 名称带缩写 IE（Capability IE）；MAC 与 PHY 的 PIB（PAN 信息库）条目使用小写前缀“mac”或“phy”（macDevServicesBroadcast、phyCurrentChannel）；MAC 常量以斜体“m”开头、PHY 常量以斜体“p”开头；服务原语全大写，而其后缀（.request、.indication、.response、.confirm）始终小写。原语概念（4.7）是整个标准用于层间交互的抽象：一条服务原语在某层与其用户之间穿过一个 SAP（服务访问点），且恰好有四种通用类型——request（发起服务）、indication（向用户告知内部事件）、response（完成由 indication 发起的过程）、confirm（返回先前 request 的结果）。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as Service user
  participant P as Service provider
  participant U2 as Peer user
  U->>P: Request
  P->>U2: Indication
  U2->>P: Response
  P->>U: Confirm
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
  participant U as 服务用户
  participant P as 服务提供者
  participant U2 as 对端用户
  U->>P: Request 请求
  P->>U2: Indication 指示
  U2->>P: Response 响应
  P->>U: Confirm 确认

summary.en: Coverage map — every unit of Clauses 1, 3, and 4 and where it lives
summary.zh: 覆盖地图——第 1、3、4 章每个单元及其所在位置

blocks.en: Clause 1 Overview: 1.1 Scope (PHY+MAC for >200 Mb/s links), 1.2 Purpose (low cost/power, multimedia + point-to-point use cases). Clause 3: 3.1 Definitions (DEV, piconet, PNC, superframe, CTA, stream, QoS, security terms), 3.2 Acronyms and abbreviations (the full lookup table). Clause 4 General description: 4.1 What is a piconet? (ad hoc, ~10 m); 4.2 Components (DEV, PNC, parent/child/neighbor/dependent/independent piconets). 4.3 MAC functionality overview — 4.3.1 Coordination (incl. 4.3.1.1 starting, 4.3.1.2 handover, 4.3.1.3 child, 4.3.1.4 neighbor); 4.3.2 Ending a piconet; 4.3.3 Ending with a dependent piconet; 4.3.4 Association/disassociation; 4.3.5 Security overview (Mode 0/Mode 1, AES-128 CCM); 4.3.6 Superframe (beacon/CAP/CTAP); 4.3.7 Channel time management (async CAP, isochronous + async CTAs, pseudo-static CTAs); 4.3.8 Data communications (fragmentation, no/Imm/Dly-ACK); 4.3.9 Information discovery; 4.3.10 Dynamic channel selection; 4.3.11 Power management (DSPS/PSPS/APS); 4.3.12 Transmit power control; 4.3.13 Quasi-omni superframe (mmWave); 4.3.14 Frame aggregation; 4.3.15 Beam forming; 4.3.16 Channel probing; 4.3.17 Unequal error protection (UEP). 4.4 2.4 GHz PHY — 4.4.1 general characteristics (2.4–2.4835 GHz, 11–55 Mb/s), 4.4.2 coexistence and interoperability. 4.5 mmWave PHY — 4.5.1 characteristics (57–66 GHz; SC/HSI/AV sub-PHYs + CMS), 4.5.2 piconets using mmWave PHY modes. 4.6 Conventions (naming rules). 4.7 Concept of primitives (request/indication/response/confirm across a SAP).
blocks.zh: 第 1 章 概述：1.1 范围（为 >200 Mb/s 链路定义 PHY+MAC），1.2 目的（低成本/低功耗，多媒体 + 点对点用例）。第 3 章：3.1 定义（DEV、微微网、PNC、超帧、CTA、流、QoS、安全术语），3.2 缩写与缩略语（完整查找表）。第 4 章 总体描述：4.1 什么是微微网？（自组织，约 10 米）；4.2 组成部分（DEV、PNC、母/子/邻居/从属/独立微微网）。4.3 MAC 功能概览——4.3.1 协调（含 4.3.1.1 启动、4.3.1.2 移交、4.3.1.3 子网、4.3.1.4 邻居网）；4.3.2 结束微微网；4.3.3 涉及从属网的结束；4.3.4 关联/解关联；4.3.5 安全概览（模式 0/模式 1，AES-128 CCM）；4.3.6 超帧（信标/CAP/CTAP）；4.3.7 信道时间管理（CAP 异步、等时 + 异步 CTA、伪静态 CTA）；4.3.8 数据通信（分片，no/Imm/Dly-ACK）；4.3.9 信息发现；4.3.10 动态信道选择；4.3.11 功率管理（DSPS/PSPS/APS）；4.3.12 发射功率控制；4.3.13 准全向超帧（毫米波）；4.3.14 帧聚合；4.3.15 波束成形；4.3.16 信道探测；4.3.17 非等差错保护（UEP）。4.4 2.4 GHz PHY——4.4.1 总体特性（2.4–2.4835 GHz，11–55 Mb/s），4.4.2 共存与互操作。4.5 mmWave PHY——4.5.1 特性（57–66 GHz；SC/HSI/AV 子 PHY + CMS），4.5.2 使用毫米波 PHY 模式的微微网。4.6 约定（命名规则）。4.7 原语概念（跨 SAP 的 request/indication/response/confirm）。

cites.note: Clause 3.1 Definitions (DEV, piconet, PNC, superframe, CTA, stream, security terms)
Clause 4.1 What is a piconet?, 4.2 Components, Figure 4-1, start of 4.3
Clause 4.3.1 Coordination through 4.3.3 Ending with dependent piconet
Clause 4.3.4 Association through 4.3.9 Information discovery; superframe Figure 4-2
Clause 4.3.10 Dynamic channel selection through 4.3.17 UEP; start of 4.4
Clause 4.4 2.4 GHz PHY, 4.5.1 mmWave PHY characteristics, 4.5.2 piconets using mmWave modes
Clause 4.6 Conventions and 4.7 Concept of primitives (Figure 4-4)
